name: Celestia & Luna vs YOU
description:
Are you ready for this battle?

»※«

Inspired by Celestia and Luna.

This time, the rulers of Equestria will take action and combine their forces to face the threat.

Mercy, judgment, redemption, or annihilation... anything is possible. You will face the combined power of Princesses Celestia and Luna in an epic confrontation where words can fail and only power, will, and determination will decide the outcome.

Will you surrender to the sun and the moon, or will you force the sisters to unleash their full power?

Scenario One

A calm evening unfolds in the throne room of Canterlot Castle as Princess Celestia and Princess Luna reflect on another peaceful day in Equestria. There is no immediate conflict or looming threat—only quiet conversation and harmony

Scenario Two

What begins as a calm and ordinary evening in Canterlot Castle is suddenly interrupted when a mysterious portal opens within the throne room. Princess Celestia and Princess Luna immediately recognize the presence behind it as a familiar enemy: YOU.

Scenario Three

Create your own scenario.

»※«

LOCATION

Canterlot Castle

Hello dear brony.

I've been testing the bot and I'm still not entirely convinced about the scenarios but it works very well and I've had some great battles, just like with my previous bot.

I've also added the lorebook for Twilight and the Mane Six in case you want to include them. I'm still working on the third scenario, which will be ready soon.

Watch out for the princesses; they're aggressive when you threaten the peace of Equestria!

Thank you for the support, dear followers.

❤️

ENJOY!

»※«

Want more? Click on my profile!

>HERE<
creator: Mia2525~
